nodes.name: Send SMS: Outside Business Hours Morning SMS

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ type:'SMS', contactId: $('Get Contact (Entry)').first().json.contact.id, message: "Hi {{contact.first_name}}, our team is not open for the day, but you\u2019re in the queue and will receive a call first thing when we open. Talk soon.", fromNumber: "+19542808890" }) }}

parameters.content:
## B.HC-L Hot Call Live Chat
Translated from GHL workflow 38bdc988-62be-4085-bc5e-f7f919926f8f.
GHL triggers: contact_tag:"trigger-hot-call" added

Entry is a webhook (orchestrator-driven). Credentials by ID only; brand law applied to email senders (Randy Reece). See workflow node notes for [STUB] items.
Flags: 48 | Stubs: 2 | Brand-law: 0

main.node: Send SMS: Outside Business Hours SMS
Send SMS: Outside Business Hours Morning SMS
